creator: nox@jelal.hb.north.de
text:
Looks like either vi, bash, elvis all put the keypad in the
	wrong mode or the xterm termcap entry is bad.
	(Or this is intentional and i'm not yet enlightened. :)
	NumLock in on btw, and also cons25 does not have the problem.

Fix: 

If i use a xterm termcap entry with the ks and ke definitions
	swapped the keypad works.  Also if i set TERM=cons25.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Try to enter some numbers on the keypad in vi or bash...
